description_long: This sculpture depicts an abstract, stylized human figure seated on a rectangular pedestal. The figure is rendered in a smooth, pale stone, with its knees drawn up to its chest and arms wrapped around them, head resting on the forearms in a pose of introspection or contemplation. The form is simplified, with minimal facial features and limbs blending into the body, creating a continuous, flowing silhouette. The back of the figure is rounded and broad, while the front view reveals the tightly curled posture. The pedestal is a simple, unadorned rectangular block, complementing the organic curves of the figure above. The overall impression is one of quiet solitude and emotional depth.
description: A smooth, abstract stone sculpture of a seated human figure with arms wrapped around knees, resting on a rectangular pedestal. The form is minimalist and contemplative.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's head resting on crossed arms atop its knees, with the body tightly curled and the pedestal visible below.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad, rounded back and shoulders of the figure, with minimal detail and the pedestal base.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the continuous curve of the back and the tucked-in legs, emphasizing the figure's compact, introspective posture.
description_view_3: Top-down frontal view focusing on the head, arms, and knees, showing the symmetry and closed form of the sculpture.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a simple pedestal, suitable for outdoor urban spaces, plazas, or parks.
